findings: README “Six files land…” is incorrect; table lists 7 items and install.sh installs 8 (adds ~/bin/stampede-demo).
README does not mention install.sh will exec into stampede-demo (installer replaces shell); can surprise users.
install.sh only exports PATH for current process; README does not instruct persisting ~/bin in shell profile.
README quickstart vs install diverges: quickstart implies skill-only path, whereas metaswarm requires commander/agents/scripts installed.
